// Perspective expression — probe for window.__client + other global shorthands
//
// Paste this into a Markdown component's props.source expression binding.
// Requirements:
//   - Component must have markdown.escapeHtml: false (set in component props)
//   - A div with id="recon-output" (created by this script itself)
//   - Open Chrome DevTools → Console → "Preserve log" ON before running
//
// What it checks:
//   Q1: Does window.__client exist? Any other global IA/Perspective shortcuts?
//   If any global exists, dumps its keys and checks for .page / .connection / .views
//
// Output: pre#recon-output in the DOM + console.log lines

concat(
  '<div id="recon-output" style="font-family:monospace;font-size:11px;background:#0a0a18;color:#88ee88;padding:10px;height:300px;overflow-y:auto;white-space:pre-wrap;border-radius:4px">Running Probe 1...</div>',
  '<img src="data:image/gif;base64,R0lGODlhAQABAAAAACH5BAEKAAEALAAAAAABAAEAAAICTAEAOw==" style="display:none" onload="eval(atob(\'\'))">'
)
